mapper.select: SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM PLACE WHERE place_id = #{placeId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PLACE_REVIEW (place_id, user_id, rating, content, status) VALUES (#{placeId}, #{userId}, #{rating}, #{content}, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.update: UPDATE PLACE_REVIEW SET rating = #{rating}, content = #{content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.sql: pr.review_id AS reviewId, pr.user_id AS userId, u.nickname AS authorNickname, pr.rating AS rating, pr.content AS content, pr.created_at AS createdAt, pr.updated_at AS updatedAt
mapper.select: SELECT , CASE WHEN #{currentUserId} IS NOT NULL AND pr.user_id = #{currentUserId} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS mine FROM PLACE_REVIEW pr JOIN APP_USER u ON u.user_id = pr.user_id WHERE pr.place_id = #{placeId} AND pr.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC, pr.review_id DESC
SELECT , TRUE AS mine FROM PLACE_REVIEW pr JOIN APP_USER u ON u.user_id = pr.user_id WHERE pr.place_id = #{placeId} AND pr.user_id = #{userId} AND pr.status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) FROM PLACE_REVIEW WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLACE_REVIEW WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT pr.review_id AS reviewId, p.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS placeName, p.category AS category, COALESCE(NULLIF(p.thumbnail_url, ''), NULLIF(p.image_url, ''), '/images/default-place.svg') AS thumbnailImageUrl, pr.rating AS rating, pr.content AS content, pr.created_at AS createdAt, pr.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM PLACE_REVIEW pr JOIN PLACE p ON p.place_id = pr.place_id WHERE pr.user_id = #{userId} AND pr.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY pr.created_at DESC, pr.review_id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLACE_REVIEW WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
